price_range.notes: Ex-showroom Delhi prices. Facelift called XUV 7XO launched Jan 5, 2026.

mileage.notes: Diesel manual and automatic variants; petrol variants are lower.

safety_features: Level 2 ADAS - Adaptive Cruise Control, Lane Keep Assist, Auto Emergency Braking, Forward Collision Warning, Traffic Sign Recognition
key_features: 6-way powered driver seat with memory function

faqs.question: What is the price of Mahindra XUV700?
faqs.answer: The Mahindra XUV700 is priced between approximately Rs. 13.66 Lakh and Rs. 24.74 Lakh (ex-showroom), depending on the variant, engine, transmission, and drivetrain.

faqs.question: Does the XUV700 come with AWD?
faqs.answer: Yes, an all-wheel-drive (AWD) option is available on the top-spec diesel automatic variant of the XUV700.

faqs.question: Is the XUV700 a 5-seater or 7-seater?
faqs.answer: The XUV700 is available in both 5-seater and 7-seater layouts depending on the variant.

faqs.question: Does the XUV700 have ADAS?
faqs.answer: Yes, the XUV700 offers a Level 2 ADAS suite including adaptive cruise control, lane keep assist, auto emergency braking, and forward collision warning on higher variants.

faqs.question: Has the XUV700 been facelifted?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mahindra launched a facelifted version of the XUV700 called the XUV 7XO on January 5, 2026, with updated styling and features.
